text:
1 

SOURCE: T-MSIS DE file 

VALUES: 0 = Not eligible for Medicaid or (CHIP) during the month 
1 = Eligible for Medicaid or CHIP (full scope of benefits) 
2 = Eligible for Medicaid or Medicaid-Expansion CHIP (restricted benefits based on alien status) 
3 = Eligible for Medicaid (restricted benefits based on Medicare dual-eligibility status; e.g., QMB, 
SLMB, QDWI, QI) 
4 = Eligible for Medicaid or CHIP (restricted benefits — pregnancy) 
5 = Eligible for Medicaid or Medicaid-Expansion CHIP
